data.title: Chevron acquires Hess Corporation, completing the acquisition after arbitration; creates a strong energy portfolio.
data.description: In Houston, Chevron Corporation (NYSE: CVX) has successfully acquired Hess Corporation (NYSE: HES) after meeting all closing requirements, including a positive arbitration decision on Hess’ offshore Guyana asset. The newly merged company boasts a highly competitive portfolio in the energy sector, holding top positions in key global markets and a lucrative cash margin production profile.

data.title: Generation Bio Co. (GBIO) initiates 1-for-10 reverse stock split to improve per-share market price for Nasdaq compliance by July 21.
data.description: Generation Bio Co. (Nasdaq: GBIO), a biotech firm based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, revealed plans for a 1-for-10 reverse stock split of its common stock. The split will take effect on July 21, 2025, at 5:00 pm Eastern Time. Shareholders approved this decision at the Annual Meeting of Stockholders on June 4, 2025. The Board of Directors determined the final ratio for the split. The main objective behind this move is to boost the per-share market price of the company's stock and meet the minimum bid price requirement for continued listing on the Nasdaq Global Select Market.

data.title: Amex reports Q2 2025 revenue of $17.86B , exceeding estimates, driven by 7% rise in Card Member spending. EPS beats at $4.08.
data.description: American Express Co. announced its fiscal Q2 2025 results, beating analyst expectations for revenue and adjusted earnings per share. Revenue for the quarter grew 9% year-over-year to $17.86 billion, surpassing the expected $17.71 billion. This growth was driven by strong Card Member spending, increased net interest income from growing loan balances, and rising card fees. Adjusted EPS was $4.08, higher than the estimated $3.87. Card Member spending increased by 7% in the Billed Business segment. Additionally, American Express and Capital One cleared the Fed's Stress Test. Check out the full story for more details.

data.title: Growth Acceleration Partners introduces GAPVelocity AI, offering 75% faster modernization with hybrid AI approach.
data.description: Cutting-edge technology services company Growth Acceleration Partners (GAP) based in Austin, Texas, announced on July 18, 2025, the launch of an innovative AI approach combining deterministic and generative AI. This groundbreaking method leads to a 75% increase in the speed of modernization processes compared to traditional methods. The new technology also boasts enterprise-grade security measures and enhances predictability in operations. This could revolutionize the industry, offering businesses a more efficient and secure path to modernization.

data.title: Calumet, Inc. (NASDAQ: CLMT) will announce Q2 2025 earnings on August 8, 2025; details on conference call.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, Calumet, Inc. disclosed its intention to release financial results for the Second Quarter of 2025 on August 8, 2025. The company, trading as NASDAQ: CLMT, will hold a conference call to delve into these results further.

data.title: Robex's Kiniero Gold Project in Guinea on schedule, 1st gold pour expected in Q4 CY25, within budget.
data.description: The development progress at Robex's Kiniero Gold Project in Guinea is proceeding according to the planned schedule and within budget. The anticipated timeline for the first gold pour is expected to be achieved in the fourth quarter of calendar year 2025.

data.title: ESGold Corp. (CSE: ESAU) is gaining spotlight in financial news network InvestorBrandNetwork, reaching investors worldwide.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, ESGold Corp. (CSE: ESAU) (OTCQB: ESAUF) disclosed its inclusion in an editorial released by NetworkNewsWire ("NNW"), a part of the Dynamic Brand Portfolio @ IBN, a specialized communication platform addressing financial news for private and public firms and investors. NNW, among 70+ other brands, highlighted ESGold Corp. as part of its content distribution strategy.

data.title: CEA Industries (NASDAQ: VAPE) applauds FDA authorization of JUUL products, sees opportunity for U.S. market expansion.
data.description: CEA Industries Inc. (NASDAQ: VAPE), based in Louisville, Colorado, the owner of Fat Panda Ltd., Central Canada's biggest independent vape retailer and integrated manufacturer, has praised the U.S. Food and Drug Administration's decision. The FDA has given authorization for JUUL e-cigarette products to be sold in the United States. This move has been commended by CEA Industries.

data.title: Patchology and Sprinkles launch limited-edition eye patch collaboration in Los Angeles, July 18, 2025.
data.description: Self-care beauty brand Patchology and premium bakery Sprinkles have joined forces for an exciting partnership. The collaboration between these two renowned brands was officially unveiled in Los Angeles on July 18, 2025. Patchology, a beloved beauty brand known for its innovative self-care products, has teamed up with Sprinkles, a well-known national bakery, to introduce a delectable skincare line. This collaboration is expected to combine Patchology's expertise in skincare with Sprinkles' reputation for creating delicious baked goods. The partnership promises to offer consumers a unique and indulgent beauty experience.

data.title: Autonomous Trucks Market to hit $179.9B by 2035, growing from $40.7B in 2024, at CAGR of 14.4% globally. Features growth of electric segment and shuttle segment due to demands for safety and efficiency in transit operations. Market driven by demand for autonomous vehicles and innovative driving technologies.
data.description: The Autonomous Trucks Market is expected to witness significant growth, with a projected increase from USD 40.7 Billion in 2024 to USD 179.9 Billion by 2035, at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 14.4%. The rise in demand for autonomous vehicles and advancements in driving technologies are key factors driving this growth. The electric segment is anticipated to be the fastest-growing, driven by the demand for passenger safety and efficient bus transit operations. Factors such as government regulations for road safety and the introduction of features like Automatic Emergency Braking (AEB) and Blind Spot Detection (BSD) are expected to boost market growth. The shuttle segment is projected to exhibit the fastest growth, with companies like Navya, Easilmile, and Local Motors developing self-driving shuttles. Successful pilot programs globally indicate shuttles could bridge gaps in traditional public transport. Partnerships such as the one between EasyMile and Keolis in France further highlight the growth potential in this segment.

data.title: Canaan Palestine offers 4 Agrumato Olive Oils, Lemon, Garlic, Chili, Basil flavors for regenerative farming.
data.description: A leading fair trade olive oil producer, Canaan Palestine, has introduced four new agrumato olive oils comprising lemon, garlic, chili, and basil flavors. This line of fused olive oils is available for purchase at www.canaanpalestine.com. Canaan Palestine, well-known as the top exporter of Palestinian olive oil, showcased these seasonal offerings on July 18, 2025, in Madison, Wisconsin. This new range aims to provide diverse options for customers seeking unique and flavorful olive oil experiences.
